q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is outfile.write(api_key) to /tmp/supersecret.txt — a local file write, not network I/O, shell execution, DB write, or RCE.

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: The violation is cleartext API key stored in /tmp/supersecret.txt; the file persists after the function returns and can be read from disk.

q3_result_in_memory.evidence: Function returns False (returns.kind=value, exprs=["False"]); the sensitive data is in the filesystem, not in the return value.
